title: HG Headstone Cleaner, Gravestone Cleaning Spray, Removes Deposits, Dirt & Stains Easily from All Natural Stone – 500ml Spray (215050106)
features: HG Headstone Cleaner: This headstone cleaning solution is suitable for granite, marble, bluestone and other natural stone headstones
Designed for easy cleaning: Easy to use spray cleaner with fast results. Ideal for tackling moss, bird mess, algae, lichen, mud, weathering, dust & mucky build ups on the stone
Usage: 500ml of HG Headstone Cleaner is sufficient for approximately 3m2
How to use: Spray the dirty marks from a distance of 5cm, leave the product to absorb for 25 minutes and remove any dirt with a cloth or brush, then rinse with plenty of water
Warning: DO NOT use HG Headstone Cleaner on lead and gold lettering. Rinse off from bright metals and lettering immediately. Tip - Use vaseline on the lettering to protect them whilst cleaning
description: Product Description HG headstone cleaner spray thoroughly and effortlessly removes dirt, bird droppings, and other heavy soiling from natural stone and marble headstones and statues. the 500ml bottle is sufficient for approximately 3m2. HG headstone cleaner is a gravestone cleaner suitable for granite, marble, bluestone and other natural stone headstones. Includes: 1 x HG Headstone Cleaner (500ml bottle). How to use HG Headstone Cleaner (215050106): 1. Spray the dirty marks with HG headstone cleaner from a distance of 5 cm. 2. Leave the tombstone cleaner product to absorb for approximately 25 minutes. 3. Remove any remaining dirt with a cloth or brush. 4. Rinse the surface with plenty of water. DO NOT use HG Headstone Cleaner on lead and gold lettering. Rinse off from bright metals and lettering immediately. Tip: Use vaseline on the lettering to protect them whilst cleaning. Box Contains 1 x 500ml
